channel.title: Customer-Managed Keys on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Customer-Managed Keys on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Encrypt Premium SSD v2 and Ultra Disks with Cross Tenant Customer Managed Keys
item.description:
Cross-tenant customer-managed keys for Premium SSD v2 and Ultra Disks are now generally available. Managed disks can now be encrypted with a CMK stored in an Azure Key Vault in a different Microsoft Entra tenant.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Versionless key support for transparent data encryption in Azure SQL Database
item.description:
Azure SQL Database now supports versionless keys for transparent data encryption (TDE). This removes the need to reference a specific key version in Azure Key Vault or Managed HSM, simplifying customer-managed key setup and reducing maintenance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Customer‑managed encryption keys now supported on Premium SSD v2 disks for Azure Database for PostgreSQL
item.description:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL now supports customer-managed keys (CMKs) with Premium SSD v2 disks in public preview. This lets you control encryption of data at rest for workloads using these disks.

  • Source: Azure Updates
